A Rare Address,

DLF Hamilton Court 2 -an ultra-luxury enclave of 4.5 BHK residences and sky-penthouses, set across 12.5 acres in the heart of Gurugram

Residences

4.5 BHK
The Project

An enclave curated for the few.

Set behind private gates in Gurugram's most sought-after corridor, DLF Hamilton Court 2 is a limited collection of expansive 4.5 BHK residences and sky-penthouses. Each home is engineered for scale -approx. 5,500 sq ft of living, with penthouses extending to 8,500 sq ft.

Six to seven sculpted towers rise from twelve and a half acres of landscaped gardens, water bodies and low-density living -an address that speaks softly, yet unmistakably

Apt Size
≈ 5,500 sq ft
Penthouses
7,500 – 8,500 sq ft
Location
Gurugram
Density
Low-rise Luxury
Key Highlights

Details that define the address.

Ultra-Luxury Segment

Positioned amongst DLF's most exclusive residences to date.

12.5 Acres of Green

Sprawling landscaped gardens, water bodies and quiet walks.

6 – 7 Iconic Towers

Sculpted architecture with panoramic city and green views.

Expansive 4.5 BHK

≈ 5,500 sq ft of thoughtfully proportioned living space.

Sky Penthouses

Rare 7,500 – 8,500 sq ft penthouses at the crown of the towers.

Private, Gated Enclave

Multi-tier security, private drop-off and concierge.

Premium Amenities

A private world, curated.

Every amenity has been chosen to reflect a rarefied way of life.

Infinity Pool
State-of-Art Gym
Spa & Wellness
Signature Dining
Landscaped Gardens
24×7 Security
Valet & Concierge
Smart Home Ready

Location Advantages

At the centre of everything that matters.

    5 min

  6. Ambience & DLF Emporio Mall
